overview.description: Czech legal and management software company, developers of CODEXIS — the most widespread legal information system in Czech Republic, with integrated AI features
overview.description_long: ATLAS GROUP (ATLAS consulting spol. s r.o. + ATLAS software a.s.) has been developing legal and management software since 1992. Their flagship product CODEXIS is the leading legal information system in the Czech Republic, featuring AI-powered research, case law analysis (Judikatura AI), and document drafting. The platform serves 70,000+ active users across law firms, corporations, municipalities, and professionals. Products also include DATIFY, EQUANTA, ONEPOST, and a contract management system.
overview.tagline: Více než 30 let přinášíme na český trh inovativní software v oblasti práva, managementu a podnikání

history.origin_story: ATLAS consulting spol. s r.o. was founded in 1992 and has since developed legal and management information systems. ATLAS software a.s. was established in 2001 as the exclusive commercial representative and distributor.

key_milestones.event: ATLAS consulting founded, begins development of legal information systems
ATLAS software a.s. established as commercial arm
Codexis AI launched — advanced AI assistant for legal professionals with 1M+ AI queries served

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: CODEXIS AI is a legal information system with AI-powered search and document analysis layered on top of a legal database. The core AI capabilities (legal Q&A, document summarization, case law analysis) are increasingly replicable by general-purpose LLMs. The proprietary moat is primarily the Czech legal database content, not the AI models themselves.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: CODEXIS is the dominant legal information system in the Czech Republic with 70,000+ active users and 30+ years of market presence. The legal software market is stable and demand is ongoing. Deep integration into law firm and enterprise workflows provides strong switching costs.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Bootstrapped and self-sustaining for 30+ years with a large established customer base. No reliance on venture funding; revenue from subscriptions provides reliable runway. Estimated ~$3M revenue with ~189 employees suggests a stable, profitable operation.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: While the business is financially stable and market-entrenched, the AI-specific features are at risk of commoditization as general-purpose LLMs improve in Czech legal domain knowledge. The proprietary legal database remains the key moat, but AI differentiation will erode unless ATLAS GROUP deepens vertical integration beyond search and Q&A.

metadata.notes: Index categorizes as 'research_group' but ATLAS GROUP is a 30+ year-old software company, not a research group. This appears to be a cataloging error — they were likely listed as a 'research group' in the Prague AI ecosystem because of their AI R&D work on CODEXIS AI. Actual HQ is Ostrava; Prague (Chodov) is a secondary office. Revenue and employee count are RocketReach estimates and may not be fully accurate.
